taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Engineering, Data Engineer
core_skills: Data integration, ETL, Agile software development, Software engineering, Software development life cycle
skill_match_scores: Data integration:1.0, ETL:1.0, Agile software development:1.0, Software engineering:1.0, Software development life cycle:1.0
must_have_quals: Possess or are working towards a bachelor's degree in Information Systems, Computer Science or a related field of study OR possess relevant work experience, Excellent written and oral communication skills, Proficient computer skills, Exhibit strong problem solving, deductive reasoning and decision making skills, Highly motivated, self directed and customer service oriented, Work independently as well as in a team environment, Learn and perform multiple tasks in a fast paced environment, Demonstrate strong organization, planning and prioritizing abilities, Demonstrate our core values of ambition, innovation, integrity and teamwork, Pass the required drug screen and background check (applicable in the US, Puerto Rico, and Guam ONLY)
preferred_quals: Possess at least 1 year of experience implementing data integration across enterprise systems, Knowledge of Agile Software Development methods, Knowledge of Software Engineering principles, included the software development life cycle and code versioning, Prior experience using ETL tools, Prior experience with Oracle and/or SQL Server databases, Prior experience with Kafka Streams and/or KSQL, Prior experience with MongoDB and/or Realm Object Server
core_responsibilities: Designing and developing large scale data and analytical systems, Designing, implementing, testing, deploying and supporting data models, storage plans, optimization strategies and other data outputs to support enterprise data needs, Translating complex business requirements into scalable technical solutions that meet data warehousing standards, Implementing and developing complex automated ETL routines, Suggesting and implementing improvements and amendments to existing products, tools, database structures, queries and reports, Conducting critical reviews of existing solutions with a view to achieving efficiency
job_summary: Fastenal is a Fortune 500 company that has grown as a distributor of industrial and construction supplies. As a Data Integration Engineer, you will help build out data pipelines connecting enterprise systems and support enterprise data needs through designing and developing large scale data and analytical systems.
